article_title: B.C. Reg. 238/2025 – College of Pharmacists of British Columbia

briefs.title: Over-the-counter nicotine mouth products no longer restricted to pharmacies in BC
briefs.summary: BC's College of Pharmacists has removed low-dose nicotine products — like nicotine pouches that dissolve in your mouth and deliver 4 mg or less per dose — from the list of items that could only be sold under pharmacy rules. This means these products may now be sold more freely outside of a pharmacy setting.
briefs.action_required: Check if you sell low-dose oral nicotine products and confirm updated sales rules with your supplier or a regulatory advisor.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 238/2025 – College of Pharmacists of British Columbia
